reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion de las chicas del shop. Ademas es bastante surtido y comodo. Todos los dias hacemos tiempo para entrar al jardin. Lindo lugar.😊😊. No califico con 5 estrellas ya que no conozco el sector de expendio de combustible

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the shop staff. It's also well-stocked and convenient. We make time to visit the garden every day. A lovely place. 😊😊. I'm not giving it a 5-star rating because I'm not familiar with the fuel sector.

reviews.comment:
Un desastre, me dijeron que el chip de mi tarjeta estaba quemado lo cual no cargaron los puntos ,me dieron el ticket firmado para cargar despues que tenga tarjeta nueva y cuando la lleve a recargarlos me dicen que no hacen ese tipo de recargas con ticket anteriores. Cargue INFINIA en ypf de av virgen del valle normalmente y me validaron los puntos en la tarjeta vieja(supuestamente tenia quemado el chip) . NO RECOMENDADO.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. They told me the chip on my card was burned out, so they wouldn't load the points. They gave me a signed receipt to load the points later when I got a new card, but when I took it to reload, they told me they don't do that type of reload with old receipts. I loaded up my INFINIA card at the YPF station on Avenida Virgen del Valle normally, and they validated the points on my old card (the one with the supposedly burned-out chip). NOT RECOMMENDED.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15636206636140683428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvLXR2S0xnEAE
